compositional_truth_check.reconciliation: The registry lists P1 (String of Nickels), P2 (Mexican Mint), P3 (Pothos), and P4 (Silver Guest). Visual audit confirms only two visible containers: one yellow pot (P1) and one black pot (P3/P4). P2 is absent or subsumed. No visible plant matter exists in any pot; all are currently bare soil or debris-filled.
new_introductions: White cylindrical object (possibly a sensor or nutrient vial) in P1/P4 vicinity

vision_report.inventory_reconciliation: Total failure of biological presence. The pots are devoid of the registered flora. The environment appears to be a dormant or failed experimental setup.

plant_audit.P1_Yellow_Pot: Empty. Contains a black sensor/marker. No plant matter.
plant_audit.P2_Black_Pot: Not visually distinct from P3/P4. Likely a systemic loss.
plant_audit.P3_Black_Pot: Contains the white rabbit anchor. Soil is dark and appears undisturbed. No Pothos present.
plant_audit.P4_Silver_Guest: No evidence of a separate specimen. Likely a systemic loss.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dark, damp-appearing, and undisturbed across all frames.
biome_observations.debris: White fragments (possibly perlite or eggshell) present in the black pot (P3).
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no organic matter or leaf litter.

temporal_deltas.t-3_to_t-2: No change. Minimal shift in shadow depth.
temporal_deltas.t-2_to_t-1: Significant drop in light intensity (likely a camera mode switch or power cycle).
temporal_deltas.t-1_to_current: Return to baseline lighting. No biological growth or movement detected.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of total biological failure. There is no evidence of living plant tissue. The presence of the white rabbit anchor and sensors suggests a controlled environment, but the lack of vegetation indicates either a pre-germination phase or a complete loss of specimens.
anomalies: Presence of non-biological hardware (sensors/markers) in pots.
White rabbit anchor is the only 'living' representation in the frame.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a sterile environment. Despite the registry, no plants are present. The pots contain only soil and technical apparatus. The 'white rabbit' is the only constant. The biome is currently non-functional as a botanical habitat.
